title: Kuma Strikes Saturn
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Atlas, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kizaru, Bonney, Unknown person #3 as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can either live as a slave or die.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nothing else can be tolerated for someone of your illk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's in a better place now!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Vegapunk!! What is the meaning of this?!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: How can Kuma still be alive?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I made use of our contingency plan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...a few days after the revolutionary army took him!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 18 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
